title: Subsurface messenger for the annual maximum lifetime maximum intensity of tropical cyclones in the western North Pacific
description: This study shows that the western North Pacific tropical cyclone peak intensity correlates with a subsurface water mass formed under the North Pacific High in the eastern North Pacific, allowing tropical cyclone intensity to be predicted years ahead.

en: Subsurface messenger for the annual maximum lifetime maximum intensity of tropical cyclones in the western North Pacific. en: America's 'forgotten hurricane zone' is sitting in the path of a catastrophe: Top forecaster warns 15 million people are not expecting it... and need to prepare NOW. As the 2026 hurricane season nears, most people are watching Florida. However, experts revealed the forgotten hurricane zone is overdue for a catastrophic storm.
la: Americae 'zonae turbinis oblitus' in semita calamitatis sedet: Top vatem admonet XV miliones hominum eam non exspectant... et nunc parandum est. Pro 2026 tempore tempestatis iam appropinquat, plerique Floridam spectant. Tamen periti zonam zephyrinam oblitam ob calamitatem calamitosam tempestatem decuit.
